title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif of Cursor interviews Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, on scaling infrastructure at Shopify, the database market cycle, and engineering culture. Topics include flash sale infrastructure, the evolution of top infrastructure teams, database innovation cycles, and AI coding limitations.
